description_long: This rifle features a distinctive bullpup configuration, with the magazine and action located behind the trigger for a compact overall length. The body is primarily matte black with a robust polymer and metal construction, and it includes a prominent carrying handle integrated with a top-mounted optical sight. The barrel is relatively short and extends forward from the main body, ending in a simple muzzle device. The rifle has a large, angular foregrip and a pistol grip for ergonomic handling, as well as a stock that is seamlessly integrated into the rear of the weapon. The design is modern and tactical, suitable for urban environments where maneuverability and compactness are essential.
description: A modern, compact bullpup rifle with a matte black finish, integrated optical sight, and ergonomic grips. Its design emphasizes maneuverability and tactical use in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow barrel profile and the alignment of the optical sight above the main body.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the bullpup layout, integrated sight, and ergonomic grips, with the magazine and action set behind the trigger.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the compact stock and the symmetry of the rifle's design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the same bullpup configuration, sight, and grip details as the other side.
